pattern_summary: Passes the fine branch layers and fails the compressed cutset layers.
reported_interpretation: Supporting comparison; compatible where branch resolution is sufficient, but not treated as unrestricted portability evidence.
claim_boundary: Branch-unit reliability dependency only; not evidence of exact geographic origin, ethnic identity, population continuity, or migration route.
